merged.Description: This recall involves St. Nicholas Square Christmas Tea Light Candle Holders. The candle holders are shaped like a Christmas tree made from plastic horseshoes and hold six tea light candles. There is a gold star at the top of the candle holder and green plastic garland with plastic red berries at the base of the candle holder.
merged.Title: Kohl's Recalls Tea Light Candle Holders Due to Fire Hazard
merged.ConsumerContact: Kohl's toll-free at 855-564-5705 from 7 a.m. to 6 p.m. CT Monday through Saturday, or online at www.kohls.com/faq/article/1013?icid=ft-customer-recalls or www.kohls.com and click on "Recalls" on the bottom of the page for more information.

Products.Name: St. Nicholas Square Christmas Tea Light Candle Holders

Images.Caption: Recalled St. Nicholas Square Christmas Tea Light Candle Holders

Injuries.Name: The firm has received two reports of tea light candle holders catching on fire. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Kohl's stores nationwide and online at www.kohls.com from September 2024 through April 2025 for about $25.

Importers.Name: Kohl's Inc., of Menomonee Falls, Wisconsin

Hazards.Name: The tea light candle holder can catch on fire, posing a fire and burn hazard.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should immediately stop using the recalled tea light candle holders and return them to any Kohl's store for a full refund, in the form of a Kohl's gift card or in the original form of payment. Kohl's will provide a pre-paid shipping label for consumers who purchased the candle holders online. Kohl's is contacting all known purchasers directly.

merged.Description: This recall involves the Spritz Taper Resin Hanukkah Dino Menorah. The menorahs are blue, made of polymer resin and measure 6 inches high x 13 inches long. They can hold up to nine tapered candles in the metal candle cups located on the dinosaur's back. The model number "240-14-1380" is printed on the product's hang tag located on the dinosaur's neck.
merged.Title: Target Recalls Spritz™ Resin Hanukkah Dino Menorahs Due to Fire Hazard
merged.ConsumerContact: Target toll-free at 800-440-0680 from 6 a.m. to 10 p.m. CT Monday through Sunday for in-store purchases, or toll-free at 800-591-3869 from 6 a.m. to 12 a.m. CT Monday through Sunday for digital purchases, or online at https://help.target.com/help/recalls or https://www.target.com/ and click on "Recalls" on the bottom of the page for more information.

Products.Name: Spritz Taper Resin Hanukkah Dino Menorahs

Images.Caption: Recalled Taper Resin Hanukkah Dino Menorah
Recalled Taper Resin Hanukkah Dino Menorah

Injuries.Name: Target has received 58 reports of the menorahs scorching, charring, melting or catching on fire. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Target stores nationwide and online at Target.com from October 2024 through January 2025 for about $15.

Hazards.Name: The recalled resin menorahs can burn or catch fire when holding lit candles, posing a fire hazard.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should immediately stop using the recalled menorahs and return them to any Target store for a full refund in the form of a Target gift card or refund in the original form of payment. Consumers may also contact Target to receive a prepaid return label to return the menorah by mail.
